entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v4.2.2+a
entry.content: # Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - Updated the Manual to the newest Stable version.

entry.title: Flipwitch Forbidden Sex Hex v1.0.6rc0
entry.content:
THIS IS NOT COMPATIBLE WITH CURRENT GAMES IF YOU USE IT I WILL HIT YOU WITH ROCK
Changes: - Damage is now based on HP items received. Lame, but avoids a weird order, and allows for every area with enemies to be documented. - Received items now check `AP_ItemReceived_X` where `X` is the item's index, and if its false, gives you the item. - This is meant to try to fix a supposed bug where you die rapidly so quickly while in a sync that some items won't be given to you and you "skip" something. (It might not even fix it)
I have not tested this completely yet, but someone mentioned wanting to help, so feel free. Just don't expect stability.

entry.title: APWorld Manager v0.0.24
entry.content: * Added support for --install command line argument. * You can use this with `./Launcher worldman -- --install <world name or world_id>`. * Added a Launcher icon * Fixed bug with --nogui

entry.title: UFO 50 v0.2.0
entry.content:
* Party House is now supported, by @Rooby-Roo * The goal logic for Night Manor has been fixed * Fixed overall victory condition
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/UFO-50-Archipelago/Archipelago/compare/0.1.8...0.1.9

entry.title: Links Awakening DX Beta v13.4.0
entry.content: - Allows Tarin's Gift to be a non-local item - Retroarch host can be configured in host.yaml

entry.title: Dark Souls II v0.6.0a2
entry.content:
Setup instructions for this release can be found [here](https://github.com/WildBunnie/Archipelago/blob/dark_souls_2/worlds/dark_souls_2/docs/setup_en.md). Info about locations [here](https://github.com/WildBunnie/Archipelago/blob/dark_souls_2/worlds/dark_souls_2/docs/location_en.md), and info about items [here](https://github.com/WildBunnie/Archipelago/blob/dark_souls_2/worlds/dark_souls_2/docs/items_en.md).
## Changes and New Features
### Fixes - Fixed crash that would happen sometimes when connecting through the client even though it would connect correctly before - Fixed crash when sending items to players with specific characters in their username - Fixed "mod could not initialize" error that would happen to some people - Max slot name in the input box in the client is now correct (16 characters)
### Archipelago - `useful_items` YAML option that allows choosing what items will be marked as useful - Now if you empty this list no item will be marked as useful - `include_items` YAML option that allows for adding extra items to the pool that might not be added by default - `include_locations` YAML option that excludes all locations NOT present inside it (inverse `exclude_locations`) - Added missing lockstone rules for some locations - Fix issue where you could have duplicate progression items - Fixed issue with some items that were marked as reachable in shaded woods even though they were after shrine of winter - Fixed `portcullis near ruined house below Cale, corpse` location being behind soldier key even though that is not the case - Fix one of the pursuer drops that was not marked as missable
### Game Modifications - Najka's tree can now be broken by hitting it
### Technical Stuff - Added logging to a file to help with debugging crashes/issues - Messages in the overlay console now only have hours, minutes and seconds instead of having year, day, etc... - Add some extra info to slotdata to allow poptracker to check the enabled dlcs and combat logic
## Links
- `apworld` code: https://github.com/WildBunnie/Archipelago/commit/e0fa411e8c23ea5e7177b138a6f84a7b5f53275c
- `ds2-modengine`: https://github.com/WildBunnie/ds2-modengine/commit/69531a8fbfac83fc93735d5eae56d68005b6ac1e
- **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WildBunnie/DarkSoulsII-Archipelago/compare/v0.6.0-alpha.1...v0.6.0-alpha.2
## Special Thanks Thank you to [iljoRSP](https://github.com/iljoRSP) for contributing to the apworld!

entry.title: Crypt of the NecroDancer v0.5.0
entry.content:
### Changes - Refactors Items and Locations logic to not require CSVs, more workable structs for Client/Rules/Generation functionality - Adds Starting Inventory setting, permitting the user to select what percentage of starting items will populate their multiworld inventory upon starting the game. Default is 50%. (Might change to 25/33% in the future, still seems rather high). - Adds Character Unlocks settings, permitting characters to be locked behind acquiring their starting items - Soft: Only during generation, allowing you to play as a character without certain non-unique starting items (minus Dorian :( ). Unique starting items still lock a character from being accessible. - Hard: The mod will not allow you to play as a character until you acquire their starting items first, identified by a yellow question mark on the selector silhouette. - Adds Unique items setting, permitting _some_ characters' unique items to be locked behind checks. This is taken into account for the character unlocks setting above. - Unique items added: Dorian's Plate Armor, Klarinetta's Shiny Armor, Hatsune Miku's Virtual Armor, Shovel Knight's Shovel Blade, Melody's Golden Lute, Eli's Hand, Dove's Flower, Klarinetta's Zweihander, Chaunter's Lantern, Suzu's Lance of Courage, Hatsune Miku's Leek, Nocturna's Transform Spell - Adds Include Materials setting, locking weapon materials in progression. Collecting a weapon material will allow for all weapon shapes to have that material in a run. (Locks Tempo's Blood Dagger starting item when soft/hard character unlocks is enabled) - Adds Zone Access Keys setting, locking future zones behind progressive/separate zone access keys. - Completing Zone 1 will not unlock Zone 2 until the respective key is unlocked, whether progressive or specific to zone 2. - Adds LockCharacterRoom setting, which will lock the character room key behind an early sphere item, locking you to your starting character until it's unlocked. - Adds StartingZone setting, which only triggers when ZoneAccessKeys is not disabled. - Starting in Zone 3, for instance, will add either two progressive zone keys or the Zone 3 access key to your starting inventory in the multiworld - Changes `per_level_zone_clears` setting to `floor_clear_checks` for better readability. Adds `per_level_zone_clears` as an alias for now.
Please see the [setup file](https://github.com/lastingParadox/Archipelago-CotND/blob/crypt-of-the-necrodancer/worlds/cotnd/docs/setup_en.md) for getting started.
Please inform me of any issues through the associated [Crypt of the NecroDancer channel in the Archipelago Discord](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1192775219740422176) or through [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/lastingParadox/Archipelago-CotND/issues).

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.2.4.post2
entry.content:
**Apworld:** - Added improved logic for round progression by @PIEisFANTASTIC - Round progression is now split up in groups of 5 per map. - Perks, Pack-a-Punch, and weapon count all apply towards what round can be logically reached. - Added round logic for some part sets that have a minimum round, like the Apothican Servant on SoE and the DG-4 on DE. - Added an option to set the number of maps you want to hit your goal round on, if doing rounds for goal. - You can exclude specific bows from the randomly selected elemental bow checks - You can select how many maps needed to goal on Goal Round, instead of always clearing every map - Goal round can be lower than maximum check round
**Mod:** - Shadows of Evil changes - Beastmode can now call trains to other stations. This should make the solo easter egg ending much safer. - Swords no longer have to be collected from the sword rock when restoring a save. Tier 1 is awarded immediately, and Tier 2 is awarded after the Pack-A-Punch ritual is complete. - Wallbuy ammo refills now also fill your clip - Fix wallbuy ammo refills not awarding ammo for upgraded weapons - Fix bug preventing Revelations from restoring map state and doing round saves if Sophia hadn't materialized yet - (Workshop) Work in progress support for 'Wanted'. Expect issues if enabled.

entry.title: The Grinch v1.5.0
entry.content:
## Changes
- Updated to require AP v0.6.6, don’t delay, security patches keep trouble away. - **DeathLink** arrives with a miserable cheer, most places can end you and spread it far and near! - Except Mount Crumpit, Clock Tower, Post Office, City Hall, & Sleigh Room, those places were spared from testing doom. - **Gadgets come sooner!** No computer demand, just reload an area, they’re placed in your hand. - **Sleigh Parts** now drift through the multiworld sea, gather them up for your sleigh ride with glee! - Their original spots are removed for now, you see. - **Grass.** - **Presents** now fill up the pool with delight, do nothing at all, but they’re there if you might. - **Squashing all Gifts** may vanish from play, if one subarea’s excluded along the way. - With `giftsanity` on, Whoville trimmed? That mission is gone, just like it was skimmed. - Added `misc_checks` for odd little finds from platforms to killsanity, and other strange kinds. - Added new **item/location groups** to tidy the mess. - **Submarine World** can now be excluded with ease, and you’ll start with Marine Mobile, if you please. - `music_rando` arrives with a shuffle so grand, every tune mixed up across all the land! - Added a **Mount Crumpit check** after smashing five crates, a single reward for your smashing-filled fates. - **Sleigh Room Key** now skips balancing’s chore, straight to the goal, no waiting anymore!
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed rogue locations that sent checks astray, now only behave in the proper way. - Crumpit’s tall elevator, with teleports aligned, now lands where it should, no confusion to find. - Small logic tweaks that were missed in the past, now tightened and cleaned, they’re fixed at last. - Heart of Stones checks now send without fail, no more lost signals that quietly derail. - Scout Clothes no longer misfire their role, when regions are missing, they won’t break the goal. - Countdowns reset when teleports occur, no lingering timers to cause a blur. - Rat missions reworked for quicker dispatch, though order stays messy, they won’t always match. - Snowmen now “Smashing” their true name restored, no more “Squashing” confusion aboard. - Robot Parts feeding at Who Bris Shack’s door, now needs **Seize** in logic, as it should have before.

entry.title: The Grinch v1.5.1
entry.content: This is more of an internal change, since there was a meta change on how apworlds are built that I was not even aware of. This is still just v1.5.0 with no additional changes minus backend changes with the new meta. Thanks AP :)

entry.title: Dicey Dungeons v0.2.4b0
entry.content:
Changes from v0.2.3-beta:
- New Option: Equipment Availability - "vanilla" is current logic, only allows equipment to be in episodes/locations they could be in game. - "open" is new logic, allows received equipment to generate anywhere
NOTE: I learned what a rebase is, so if anything is horribly broken, that's why
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Fylcoast/AP_diceydungeons/compare/v0.2.3-beta...v0.2.4-beta

entry.title: Schedule I v3.5.1
entry.content: Updated Incorrect logic for Vibin' the Cybin quests and shrooms recipe checks. Updated logic for when randomize cartel influence true and randomize customers is false.

entry.title: Buckshot Roulette v0.2.0
entry.content:
**Hotfix 1 (3/23/2026):** Removed notification sound that would play after every chat message.
## Features - **Consumable Item Randomization** - Item unlocks are shuffled randomly - **Steam Achievements** - Obtain items from completing achievements - **Shotsanity** - Obtain items from successful shots - **Streaksanity** - Obtain items from successful shots on the dealer in a row without being shot yourself - **Customizable Goal** - Choose from one of the following goals: - **70K**: Beat the game - **140K**: Beat 6 Double or Nothing rounds in a row - **1000K**: Cash out in Double or Nothing mode with a score of at least 1 million - **Custom**: Cash out in Double or Nothing mode with a user-specified minimum score - **Consumable Item Logic** - Customize how many consumable are expected to beat a certain number of rounds - **Custom Mechanics** - Unique gameplay features specific to the Archipelago world - **Hint Mode** - Complete rounds and achievements to get hints for locations in other slots in an Archipelago game ## Changelog ### World #### Streaksanity - Added a new set of locations that trigger when shooting the dealer multiple times in a row without being shot yourself - Shooting the dealer with a live round adds one kill to your streak - The following events will reset your streak: - Getting shot by the dealer - Shooting yourself with a live round - Getting death linked - Resetting the game #### Other - Removed the *Achievements* option - Achievements are now always enabled by default - The *Full House* achievement can still be excluded ### Client #### Hint Mode - Added *Hint Mode*—An alternate way to play Buckshot Roulette in Archipelago - Buckshot Roulette can be played as a hint game by toggling *Hint Mode* in the in-game connection interface - Completing rounds and achievements will send hints for random locations within the world of the slot you're connected to - In *Hint Mode*, you start with all items. Double or Nothing is also unlocked after beating the main game - *Hint Mode* cannot be toggled while connected to a slot - You do not need the Buckshot Roulette APWorld to play in *Hint Mode* #### Text Client - Added a text client in-game - Can be found in the tracker window (press **Tab** while in-game) - Can be used to execute commands (!hint, !release, !collect, !alias, etc.) #### Streaksanity - Added functionality #### Other - Reverted change made in v0.1.1 that made Progressive Item Luck decrease the chance of the dealer drawing items, as it caused crashes when drawing items ## Guides - [Info](<https://github.com/asdfwyay/APBuckshot/blob/dev/worlds/buckshot/docs/en_Buckshot Roulette.md>) - [Setup & Updating](https://github.com/asdfwyay/APBuckshot/blob/dev/worlds/buckshot/docs/setup_en.md)

entry.title: Crypt of the NecroDancer v0.5.1
entry.content:
### Changes - Fixes typo in "APDoubleTempoMode" item from "APNoDoubleTempoMode" - Fixes capitalization-related typo causing Caged NPCs to not spawn in Zone 5 - Reorders and re-categorizes options, fixes some wording - Minor consolidation of code for APItem mod communication vs CotND item mod communication
Please see the [setup file](https://github.com/lastingParadox/Archipelago-CotND/blob/crypt-of-the-necrodancer/worlds/cotnd/docs/setup_en.md) for getting started.
Please inform me of any issues through the associated [Crypt of the NecroDancer channel in the Archipelago Discord](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1192775219740422176) or through [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/lastingParadox/Archipelago-CotND/issues).

entry.title: Manual_ResidentEvil5_Garbo v5.post1
entry.content: - Updated to Manual Stable 20260319 - Fixed a logic issue where "6-2 Defeat Ship Bridge Uroboros" was not requiring the Bridge Keycard to access properly

entry.title: Schedule I v3.5.2
entry.content:
Bug fixes: Removed benjo from the item pool Fixed Jackie Stevenson logic
Thank you Razgriz!

entry.title: Path of Exile v1.3.0.post2
entry.content:
## Patch notes: - Added support for Path of Exile 3.28 - Changed Templar's starting gems - Added new gems, and the Reliquarian - Modified generation to support Reliquarian. - Added a manifest file, to support future archipelago releases.
## Bug fixes: - Added Wither
## NOTES: - There may be need for more alternate gems with the exceptional gem system (or maybe a item that would unlock all of them 🤔) - New poptracker for this release, here: https://github.com/stubobis1/PathOfExilePoptracker/releases/tag/1.3.0
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stubobis1/Archipelago/compare/1.2.1...1.3.0

entry.title: Ape Escape 3 v2.0.3.post2
entry.content: # Ape Escape 3 Archipelago v2.0.3 :warning: **GENERATION CHANGES** :warning: **host.yaml CHANGES** ## Features ### Logic - Added more uses for Boost Fly, Genie Dancer, Morph Infinite Jump, Clips and other tricks (@mrgamekiller, @bmanrulesyou21, @branch) ### Options - `specters_goal_target_as_post` [default: `true`] Forces a corresponding Specter channel to PGC if a relevant Goal Target is selected. This is a shorthand to adding the desired Specter channel to `post_channel` - `blacklist_bosses` Forces boss channels to be excluded from the channel pool. This is a shorthand to adding the desired bosses to `blacklist_channel` - Options: `disabled` [default], `enabled`, `keep_specters` - `emulator_preferred_slot` Determine the preferred Slot to connect to PCSX2 with on the Client. - `emulator_linux_preferred_platform` (Linux) Determine the preferred PCSX2 installation type to connect to by the Client. - Options: `auto`, `standard` (appimage, or others), `flatpak` ### Client - New Commands: `pine_slot`, `pine_platform`, `pine_connect` - These commands allow players to change what PCSX2 instance to connect to during play by identifying the emulator instance by slot (and platform for linux as well). - Status now reports your PINE Slot/Platform ### host.yaml - `pine_connect_offline` [default: `false`] Determine if the client should try to establish a connection with PCSX2 even if it has not yet connected to an Archipelago Room ## Fixes ### Logic - Fixed some erroneous entrance rules

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.7.0
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.7.0 This update is NOT compatible with worlds generated on previous versions!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md).
This is a big one! # Additions - New UI for basic messages, such as players leaving, joining, chatting, and goaling. - New UI for displaying server countdown status. - New UI to pick the next layer after finishing one or starting a run. - Archipelago messages in the console now have an Archipelago prefix. - Two new traps. Temptation Trap and Trip Trap. [APWorld Change] - Instances of the word 'Archipelago' that were colored now rotate their colors. - There is now a (poorly made) custom logo on the main menu. - Archipelago Items and Randomize Recipes have received a complete rework. - Randomize Recipes is back to being a toggle, where it only adds the recipes as items, and adds no checks. - Archipelago Items are now a seperate option, where you can choose how many items there are in the world to check, up to 200. - Archipelago Items now have dynamic sprites (using KaitoKid.ArchipelagoUtilities.Net). - This does not work in trader inventories, but it's not worth the effort to make it work there. - Crates, Chests, Traps, and other misc objects will now always drop an Archipelago Item when destroyed or opened. - This also applies to Survivors, which are guarenteed to always sell a free Archipelago Item. - To balance how common Archipelago items are, they now give 10 INT exp instead of 35.
# Changes - Basegame debug and cheat commands are now disabled if the Archipelago server is in race mode. - Trap items will no longer trigger Experiment dialog. - Item receive and hint popups now have item coloring. - Experiment will now say messages typed into `apchat`. - Moodlesanity checks now show feedback when they are sent out. - The Archipelago UI now shares a font with the normal game's UI. - The Progressive STR dialog where Experiment says their current weight is now rounded to one decimal instead of six. - Archipelago Items are now weightless (down from 0.2u).
# Fixes - Fixed Experiment dialog rarely throwing errors. - Getting enough experience to level up more than once will now properly send two Skillsanity checks. - Items received from the Cheat Console or !getitem will no longer show in the text client. - Fragile Items Trap should no longer completely lock up item receiving. - Items received while on the main menu will now display properly. - The game no longer crashes when using Archipelago commands after disconnecting. - The server version is no longer shown in the bottom left after disconnecting. - Fixed the persistent "Ensure Read/Write is enabled on the Particle System's Texture" error. - Generation isn't stopped early if the amount of items is the same as the amount of locations. [APWorld Change] - Fixed there being twice as many Limb items as there should have been.
# Known Issues Getting two traps in quick succession can cause the incorrect slot name inside the trap Moodle Recipes may sometimes wipe themselves upon reconnection. Getting another recipe item triggers a failsafe that should fix this Universal Tracker shows the wrong Moodles being in logic when Moodlesanity is set to Questboard A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with Harmony.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.6.6...v0.7.0

entry.title: Phoenotopia: Awakening v0.2.0
entry.content:
Minor release - 0.2.1

Minor patch to fix several generation errors and some bugs.

Changes:

- **Several generation errors fixed**: Some yaml setting combinations caused generation to fail. These are now fixed. If you find more, please report them to me! - **New fishing check**: Added the fish in the Anuri Temple pond as a location under 'Fishing spots'. - **Prelude of Panselo is now correctly handled when its location is excluded**: With NPC gifts disabled and 'keep key items in item pool' enabled, it was possible to get the item twice. Once from the item pool and once at its vanilla location. Now you can only get it from the item pool. - **Logic refinement**: Some checks within non-liftable breakable objects now require you to have something to break them. Full patch notes of 0.2.0 can be found [here](https://github.com/Amphyros/Phoenotopia-Awakening-AP-client/releases/tag/v0.2.0). If you encounter any issues while playing, please let me know!

entry.title: ToeJam and Earl v0.5.4
entry.content:
## Big changes
- New type of present: the Big Points present, which simply gives you a flat number of points (the exact number depends on your chosen rank options, but is roughly 'half an average promotion'). Add `point_presents: yes` to your YAML to enable. - ⚠️ This functionality supersedes the old `flat_promotions` option, which has been removed. Point presents exist alongside Promotions. - `auto_flat_promotions` has been removed and replaced with `auto_point_presents`, which fulfils the same function. - One of the unused present sprites will be automatically patched in for you if needed. - Moles will not steal these presents if rank checks are enabled. - New priority check: drinking lemonade on level 0. Add `lemonade_check: yes` to your YAML to enable. - `game_overs: drop_down` has been altered to account for these checks: if you game over on level 1 before completing the lemonade check, you will be poofed back to the starting island instead of falling down. - The `earthling_rando: nice_random` setting has been redone based on the subjective dangerousness of each earthling, constrained by the apparent difficulty of each level in the vanilla game. - For now, dangerousness is based on my own subjective opinion. If you can, please rate the enemies [via this Google form](https://forms.gle/F6wECA91ZVifDAK99) so I can update the data in a future release. - Fake mailboxes are now taken into account when considering the difficulty of levels. - The value of `last_level` is now factored in when deciding how many friendly earthlings to add. - This new method also fixes a rare bug that caused generation failure due to an extremely lopsided random earthling pool.
## Smaller changes
- Presentsanity may now add a small number of Promotions (and point presents, if enabled) in order to ensure gen success in smaller worlds. - Game overing with `game_overs: drop_down` will now gracefully poof you down to the level below instead of awkwardly making you fall there. - Items are no longer awarded while falling, or while in an elevator in any state. This addresses several issues with items failing to activate. - Many items have been deprioritized in various situations in order to make priority checks more rewarding. - Present wrapping is now preserved through save & reload. - Ranks and big items are now priority locations. - Renamed "A Buck" to just "Buck".
## Small bugfixes
- The 2 points for drinking the lemonade on level 0 have been added into logic (finally). - Sound rando now also randomizes the scream in the intro cutscene. - Fixed a bug that sometimes stopped presents from scooching up correctly with expanded inventory enabled.
## Other
- Added LICENSE for vendored unidecode (whoops).

entry.title: Path of Exile v1.3.1
entry.content:
## There was a trailing comma in 1.3.0 that broke everything, this version fixes that.
# 1.3.0 patch notes:
## Patch notes: - Added support for Path of Exile 3.28 - Changed Templar's starting gems - Added new gems, and the Reliquarian - Modified generation to support Reliquarian. - Added a manifest file, to support future archipelago releases.
## Bug fixes: - Added Wither
## NOTES: - There may be need for more alternate gems with the exceptional gem system (or maybe a item that would unlock all of them 🤔) - New poptracker for this release, here: https://github.com/stubobis1/PathOfExilePoptracker/releases/tag/1.3.0
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stubobis1/Archipelago/compare/1.2.1...1.3.0

entry.title: Crypt of the NecroDancer v0.5.2
entry.content:
### Changes - Fix DeathLink tag not being initialized properly on connecting to the Archipelago Server - Make SetDeathLink asynchronous to actually send SetDeathLink packet to the mod
Please see the [setup file](https://github.com/lastingParadox/Archipelago-CotND/blob/crypt-of-the-necrodancer/worlds/cotnd/docs/setup_en.md) for getting started.
Please inform me of any issues through the associated [Crypt of the NecroDancer channel in the Archipelago Discord](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1192775219740422176) or through [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/lastingParadox/Archipelago-CotND/issues).

entry.title: TOEM: A Photo Adventure v2.0.2
entry.content:
Changes:
- No apworld change from 2.0.2 (so you don't need to update the apworld if already on 2.0.2) - Bugfix: Make TraversedEntrances in DataStorage updated async. Might fix the ER transition breaking bug - Bugfix: Have Basto item checks not use IsLocationChecked when Basto is disabled - Bugfix: Allow checking the water popper location if gate is already opened
Randomizer details: https://github.com/bbernardoni/Archipelago/blob/toem/worlds/toem/docs/en_TOEM.md Setup guide: https://github.com/bbernardoni/Archipelago/blob/toem/worlds/toem/docs/setup_en.md

entry.title: Hatsune Miku Project Diva Mega Mix+ v1.4.4.post2
entry.content:
# Update Time!
## World/Client Changes
### Additions: - New option! Progressive HP! Start with drastically lower max HP and raise it via items (No tied-in logic for song difficulty, good luck!) - Universal Tracker Go Mode support - Generator conflict message is now more verbose - Generator support for New Classics - /restore_songs has been replaced with /safe_mode and is more flexible - Available Leek% max raised from 40 to 100 (Only recommended for Solo seeds) - Client now finds the AP mod folder (which can now be named anything) - Client now tracks result.json in a cleaner way - Updated option descriptions - Updated set up guide instructions - Improved determinism when generating with traps - Changed default outfits for BK song to represent AP logo
### Fixes: - Fix for goaling on one slot, switching to another, and goaling - Fix for entering and leaving Freeplay - Fix cross-player generation state leak with multiple Diva players
## Mod updates:
### Additions: - Progressive HP, refreshes at 1s intervals if enabled - New suhidden toggle in config (sudden and hidden can overlap) - New skip_mainmenu toggle in config - New reload_delay option in config - Popup on first run informing of the reload key and config.toml - Config is reloaded on main menu (to apply changes without restarting) - Improved compatibility with Debug Mode, Mix Mode, and custom modifier mods - Improved option typing in config.toml - In-game song visibility toggling: 100% Accurate-Not-Our-Problem™ tier New Classics, lyric packs, Eden Project, F 2nd Pack, etc. It's your problem now!
### Fixes: - Fixed trap_duration of 0 in config not lasting the entire attempt - Traps run at ~1/10th a second instead of every frame - The reload key is ignored during gameplay/results to avoid crashes - AP mod folder can now be named anything - Various small stability fixes

entry.title: Pokemon Stadium v0.5.0
entry.content:
**THIS RELEASE INVOLVED LARGE CHANGES TO THE CODE. THERE IS A VERY HIGH CHANCE OF FINDING BUGS.** - If you need a more stable release, v0.4.2 is recommended
### Summary - Adds locations for the 4 Cups as well as the relevant items. Includes new locations for Trainersanity.

entry.title: keen v0.0.2
entry.content: # v0.0.2 - First public release [About this implementation](https://github.com/kodbyte/Archipelago-Keen/blob/keen-ap/worlds/keen/docs/en_Keen.md) [Setup Guide](https://github.com/kodbyte/Archipelago-Keen/blob/keen-ap/worlds/keen/docs/setup_en.md)

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v19.0.0
entry.content:
### This apworld is a beta apworld, only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 (in RC as of the release of this release)
## 🗳️ New Options * Puzzle and Minigames rando * When randomized, the games are about as hard as vanilla, with 2 less screens for hide & seek * Owl-related puzzles are not affected * No push block is added
## ⏫ Miscellaneous Improvements * Used up gasha spots are now represented with the dug tile * The game now shows which item is being obtained when the item is from a different world * Generation is faster * Asking for `included essences` placed essences will set the placed essences to the number included
## 🧠 Logic * Cane of somaria is now a in-logic way to kill golden beasts (it's decently hard) * Bomb/bombchu requirement is now more consistent, unless there is a consistent way to refill it * 40 bombs are required to fight * 20 bombs are required to destroy bombable tiles * 20 bombs are required for bombjumps * 20 bombchus are required to fight * 40 bombchus are required to destroy tiles * Jumping the goron pits with just a cape has been upgraded from medium to hard logic * Some anti-softlocks have been removed, which affects some of the logic * Added a logic path to leave d2 * Fixed a logic issue where the d8 spinner chest was reachable without magnet glove * Added a hell logic path from frypolar to d8 spinner chest without magnet glove
## 🛠️ Bugfixes * Made use of pre_output, unit tests now work on OoS * Fixed a text at random being broken each seed * Fixed dimitri clipping and respawning at the closed d4 entrance * Melting the red and blue ores, then leaving the room to come back no longer gives hard ore instead of the normal item

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v19.0.1
entry.content:
### This apworld is a beta apworld, only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 (in RC as of the release of this release)
## 🗳️ New Options * Puzzle and Minigames rando * When randomized, the games are about as hard as vanilla, with 2 less screens for hide & seek * Owl-related puzzles are not affected * No push block is added
## ⏫ Miscellaneous Improvements * Used up gasha spots are now represented with the dug tile * The game now shows which item is being obtained when the item is from a different world * Generation is faster * Asking for `included essences` placed essences will set the placed essences to the number included
## 🧠 Logic * Cane of somaria is now a in-logic way to kill golden beasts (it's decently hard) * Bomb/bombchu requirement is now more consistent, unless there is a consistent way to refill it * 40 bombs are required to fight * 20 bombs are required to destroy bombable tiles * 20 bombs are required for bombjumps * 20 bombchus are required to fight * 40 bombchus are required to destroy tiles * Jumping the goron pits with just a cape has been upgraded from medium to hard logic * Some anti-softlocks have been removed, which affects some of the logic * Added a logic path to leave d2 * Fixed a logic issue where the d8 spinner chest was reachable without magnet glove * Added a hell logic path from frypolar to d8 spinner chest without magnet glove
## 🛠️ Bugfixes * Made use of pre_output, unit tests now work on OoS * Fixed a text at random being broken each seed * Fixed dimitri clipping and respawning at the closed d4 entrance * Melting the red and blue ores, then leaving the room to come back no longer gives hard ore instead of the normal item

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v19.0.1
entry.content:
### This apworld is a beta apworld, only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 (in RC as of the release of this release)
## 🗳️ New Options * Puzzle and Minigames rando * When randomized, the games are about as hard as vanilla, with 2 less screens for hide & seek * Owl-related puzzles are not affected * No push block is added
## ⏫ Miscellaneous Improvements * Used up gasha spots are now represented with the dug tile * The game now shows which item is being obtained when the item is from a different world * Generation is faster * Asking for `included essences` placed essences will set the placed essences to the number included
## 🧠 Logic * Cane of somaria is now a in-logic way to kill golden beasts (it's decently hard) * Bomb/bombchu requirement is now more consistent, unless there is a consistent way to refill it * 40 bombs are required to fight * 20 bombs are required to destroy bombable tiles * 20 bombs are required for bombjumps * 20 bombchus are required to fight * 40 bombchus are required to destroy tiles * Jumping the goron pits with just a cape has been upgraded from medium to hard logic * Some anti-softlocks have been removed, which affects some of the logic * Added a logic path to leave d2 * Fixed a logic issue where the d8 spinner chest was reachable without magnet glove * Added a hell logic path from frypolar to d8 spinner chest without magnet glove
## 🛠️ Bugfixes * Made use of pre_output, unit tests now work on OoS * Fixed a text at random being broken each seed * Fixed dimitri clipping and respawning at the closed d4 entrance * Melting the red and blue ores, then leaving the room to come back no longer gives hard ore instead of the normal item

entry.title: Tevi v1.4.14
entry.content: ## Changelog + Poptracker hides money locations if they are not randomized + Heavens Valley East - Money Room X: 13 Y: 6 -> Logic adjustment + Pestilence and Pestilence Ranged added -> fix both enemies not dying and have additional checks + DreamKeeper - Money Room X: 20 Y: 6 -> Logic fixed + Disabling Randomizer freeze fixed

entry.title: Mario Kart Double Dash v0.3.0
entry.content:
This update has been a team effort! @YodaFantome is the star of the show by contributing many great things to the project, some more visible and some on the backend. There are some new features to enjoy and bug fixes for long standing problems. Note: the client isn't compatible with seeds generated with earlier (v0.2.x) versions!
Download a new apworld and options template below and have a good one! If this is your first time playing MKDD AP, here's the [setup guide](docs/en_Setup.md) and [readme](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash).
## New Features * Adds locations for some item boxes by @YodaFantome in https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/pull/64 * Now before you suggest adding boxsanity, there are some technical limitations on which boxes we could add. Know that this is something we've considered! * Here's the list of new locations: ``` Luigi Circuit - Chomp Shortcut Box Luigi Circuit - Last Curve Shortcut Box Peach Beach - Hidden Pipe Box Peach Beach - Beach Jump Box Peach Beach - Fountain Box Mushroom Bridge - Pipe Box Mushroom Bridge - Sidewalk Box Mushroom Bridge - Bridge Box Daisy Cruiser - Cargo Area Box Wario Colosseum - Great Jump Box Dino Dino Jungle - Bridge Side Box ``` * Hide locked characters in the menu by @YodaFantome in https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/pull/63 * Add support for running multiple clients with different slots on same pc by @HaychDeeHD in https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/pull/58 * Add item groups by @YodaFantome in https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/pull/62 * Allows hinting for example `!hint Kart Upgrades` to get hints for any upgrades
## Changes * Adjust Time Trials difficulty by @aXu-AP in https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/pull/67 * Thanks for the community on feedback on this! * Daisy Cruiser and DK Mountain have easier basic times * Basic times are pushed a bit further in logic
## Fixes * Fix Fireballs sometimes not working by @aXu-AP in https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/pull/68 * Thanks to _mr rlwinm_ for finding the root cause! * Prevent getting checks in demo mode by @aXu-AP in https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/pull/65 * Thanks to _mr rlwinm_! * Limit custom laps to 9 by @YodaFantome in https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/pull/61
## New Contributors * @HaychDeeHD made their first contribution in https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/pull/58 * @YodaFantome made their first contribution in https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/pull/61
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/compare/v0.2.3...v0.3.0

entry.title: Widget Inc v0.2.0
entry.content: - [ApWorld] Fixed minor logic bugs - `Napalm Charge` not requiring `Spinning Widget` - `N-Step Branch Prediction` requiring `Ascended Widget` instead of `Unshackled Widget` - [ApWorld] Added a yaml setting for starting hints for producers upto a specific tier - [Client] Added Custom Assets support - [Client] Implemented scouting locations - status messages (top right) now displays sent/recieved items - tech tree tooltips now show the item it sends and info about the item - [Client] Improved Tech Tree Readability

entry.title: Autopelago v0.11.0
entry.content:
# https://autopelago.app
The game client has been completely rewritten from scratch. It runs in the browser now.
The .apworld now has a manifest, but has otherwise not changed since 0.10.3.
# Changes since 0.11.13 1. Set the base URL to allow self-hosting it somewhere other than the site root (e.g., if I were to make subpaths like `https://old.autopelago.app/0.11.13` to run that older version). 2. Start looking for the bits that version 1.0.0 of the APWorld will (later!) start to send us to support more flavor items with only Archipelago-side updates. 3. For games with passwords, start encrypting what shows up in the URL bar. There's a lot more to it than that sounds: the encrypted password uses `&W=EncryptedPassword`, but you can still manually plug in `&w=OriginalPassword`. The encryption is there so that you can reload / bookmark the page and still connect to the game just fine, as long as you do so within the same browser profile (i.e., you can't paste your URL from Firefox to Chrome or to someone else's computer, the key is only stored locally).
Everything from the original native version *should* be present in this one. If not, then that's a bug. Please report it.
# Other changes since 0.10.4
1. You no longer need to run any native executable files. It's a web app now, so just go to that URL. - If you want to self-host it, it's all static files - this release should have a "dist.zip" asset that you can just drop into any reasonable static web server. - You will **need** to self-host if you want it to work with an Archipelago server that doesn't use HTTPS. 2. You can now launch directly to the game if you know all the magical things to type into the URL fragment. This is mostly provided so you can refresh the page without having to click through the menu again. 3. As is web tradition, most errors that happen when the game is running will not automatically take you out of the game screen. Instead, they will just create banners along the top that you have to click to dismiss. Hopefully, this will never happen to you (of course, it happened to me constantly while developing this). 4. Not only is this a web app (and so it finally runs on Mac and Android), but it's a **progressive** web app. This means that you can "install" it as a native app on Android, even. 5. Interval between "when STILL blocked" messages is now configurable (though it's still got a minimum of 15 minutes so that you don't spam everyone). 6. There's now a separate "Connecting..." screen between the settings page and the main game screen, instead of showing a version of the game screen instantly and then modifying it once you're finally connected. 7. When you get disconnected for any reason (other than clicking the button to go back to the menu), you now get spat back to the same "Connecting..." screen (with a different message) and it will try to reconnect you automatically, at least once every 30 seconds. 8. The game version is now visible in the title bar and on the game screen. This is more relevant here because browsers like to cache way too much stuff. 9. Somewhat redesigned the layout of the game screen to be a bit clearer. Instead of shorthand "RAT" / "NOM" / etc., we have a "RATS: ##" expander, and then all the active buffs / debuffs are visible with their full names under it. This takes up a lot of screen space, so you can collapse it to just show the rat count. 10. The left panel can also shrink MUCH more than before. 11. The position of the grid separator is now saved between runs. 12. If your slot has an alias, we now show that (without the parenthetical slot name) instead of always just showing the official slot name. 13. Chat commands can now be addressed to the rat's alias (with or without the parenthetical slot name) instead of always having to be its slot name, provided that nobody else in the room has picked the same alias. 14. Added a simple chat tab to just send / receive messages in the room, so that you don't HAVE to flip back and forth. It's not quite as fancy as the standard text client, but it should be good enough. 15. Elements that you can interact with all support tab-focusing, and the tooltips as well. 16. When a lot of things happen all at once that the game hasn't animated yet, the app will try to play back everything that happened. This was important when moving to a web app, because browsers don't render things when the tab is in the background or minimized, so when you come back, a LOT of things could have changed. In fact, when LOTS of things changed, it speeds up the playback up to 5x so that you can "catch up" to the current state more quickly. 17. When clicking on an item in the panel to request a hint, the confirmation box now shows up right next to it instead of in the middle of the screen. 18. The "u win." screen now just covers a *part* of the map instead of taking you all the way out. 19. Fix an oversight where the self-host bundle was still expecting to run on `https://autopelago.app` 20. Add a discriminator to the beginning of the title for the benefit of those with multiple tabs 21. #129: Bring back the ability to show the path to the target by clicking on the rat. 22. Fix a minor issue where the rat would face its ultimate target instead of the next location along the route to it. 23. Fix an issue where the rat would go to the nearest user-requested location instead of going in order of when they were requested. 24. (After the failed v0.11.2) probably fix a calculation error in the "show path" calculation? 25. #130: Bring back the ability to personalize your rat. 26. Replace Pixi.js with native elements, which should unblock those getting the error "`CanvasRenderer` is not yet implemented". This also probably brings with it a mixed bag of performance penalties and performance improvements. 27. Fix several ways in which the page could look self-inconsistent while the rat is still catching up to where the server is. 28. Correct the size of the "Personalize Your Rat!" button on the main page for non-Firefox browsers. 29. Remove a brief flicker of the "Personalize Your Rat!" window's header text. It might still sometimes shift, but generally shouldn't have any frames where the text goes outside the window like it did. 30. Add tooltips for the filler squares to show their names, exactly the same as tooltips for landmarks. 31. Add information about known hints onto these tooltips. 32. Move some quest markers out of the way so that they no longer overlap filler squares. 33. Shrink landmark images so that they don't crowd their filler squares. 34. Extra-shrink the hitboxes around the quest markers to make their nearby filler squares easier to get to. 35. Add the ability to "hyper-focus" a location by clicking on it (or pressing Enter on it if you are tabbing through with your keyboard). This "hyper-focus" can only be adjusted by interacting with it in the browser (no chat commands supported, by design) for multiple reasons. 36. #134: Fix an issue where the rat's focused location(s) would get cleared — even if the location wasn't checked — if it happened to land on the location without any actions remaining to make an attempt at checking it. 37. Fix an oversight from 0.11.5 where the animation checkboxes did nothing. - In addition to restoring the original few things that these checkboxes control: 1. Transitions on Food/Energy/Luck bars will be animated (or not) according to the player animation checkbox. 2. Tile examples in the tooltips and the "u win." dialog will be animated (or not) along with the tiles, synchronized to the same frame. 3. The dashed line showing the path from the rat to its target location will be animated (or not) according to the player animation checkbox. 4. The rat token will animate its movement from one location to the next (or not) according to the player animation checkbox. 5. On systems where the user has indicated a [preference for "reduced motion"](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Reference/At-rules/@media/prefers-reduced-motion#user_preferences), the two checkboxes will be unchecked by default. 38. #143: Stop automatically reconnecting after getting disconnected. This has been resurrecting rooms that had previously timed out, which is rude. Some version of this MAY come back in the future, if I can find a way to detect when it would be OK. 39. #142: The dashed path to the rat's current target will no longer get misaligned and shrunk on games that don't go all the way to Snakes on a Planet. 40. #138: The sidebar now has an extra spot at the beginning that shows the number of all rats. This lets you do the same stuff that the other icons in this panel let you do: click to hint for any rat (i.e., any item in the "Rats" item group) and hover over it to see a tooltip with all the hinted rat locations. 41. Because I kept getting annoyed while testing the previous one, tooltips now stay around when the cursor goes inside them instead of needing the cursor to stay inside the original trigger box. This means that you can now highlight text from these tooltips with your mouse and copy-paste. 42. I might have fixed a bug where sometimes the rat wouldn't send its chat messages immediately, but would wait for some arbitrary event to happen in the future. I have no idea why I wrote it the way I did at first... 43. Whenever we see `{RANDOM_PLAYER}` in any message from your YAML file, we'll replace that with the current alias of a random player. I tried to make this as useful and sensible as I could: - If you are the only player (on your team), it will always just pick you. Otherwise, it will never pick you, but instead: - If any other players (on your team) are connected and haven't completed their goal yet, then it will pick a random one of them. Otherwise, it will pick a random other player (on your team). - If there are multiple `{RANDOM_PLAYER}` placeholders in a single message, then we'll try to pick as many **different** players as possible (in random order still), only repeating a player if there are more placeholders than the number of players allowed by the above rules. To be precise, we sample randomly without replacement from the list until the list is empty, then we refill it and repeat the process until all placeholders have been filled. 44. Fix an oversight that caused messages to get repeatedly processed over and over again. This was most visible when telling the rat to do something: it would go into an infinite loop of acknowledging the request forever. 45. Fix an oversight where a horizontal scroll bar could appear under normal conditions just because of how close certain locations are to the edge.

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.7.1
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.7.1 This update is compatible with worlds generated on version 0.7.0 and above!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md).
# Changes - Updated Archipelago.Multiclient.Net to 6.7.1 # Fixes - Praying that this time I actually fixed received recipes randomly being wiped after death and never coming back. - Archipelago Items will now properly update to a new sprite and description after collection if more than one exists.
# Known Issues - Getting two traps in quick succession can cause the incorrect slot name inside the trap Moodle - Universal Tracker shows the wrong Moodles being in logic when Moodlesanity is set to Questboard - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators. - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.7.0...v0.7.1

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.4.3
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.4.3
# Changes - Proper merge of the fix for the missing georama bug - Expanded the text box for the slot name error message to the current slot name is actually readable - Cleaned up server rule logic code to make maintenance easier. Added a few more fruits to Osmond's requirements as well as pockets for consistency with Ungaga's requirements. Mostly only affects the spheres around Osmond. - Limited how many items the client can give to max inventory - 10. This does not include sundew, horned key, or pockets. Attachments from the client are limited to 35 as well. - Added options to change default names for characters in the .yaml, so Ungaga can be renamed! - Pay attention to the requirements or the world generation will fail - If renaming Toan, you need to make sure to connect the client *before* starting a new game! - Except for Ungaga, characters can still be renamed from the yaml names in the normal cutscenes - Added a DC1 icon so the app doesn't use the default avalonia one anymore - Fixed an issue that could cause the player to receive more items than expected, potentially clogging the inventory with unusable items - Improved handling of defense/fruit/gourd item limit. Insignificant performance gain, and also fixes some bugs likely nobody encountered/noticed. - Added a Dark Genie location/item so that in an all bosses run, if the DG is killed before the other 5 bosses it will still be recognized by the client. - Handle the game state returning to the title screen after beating the Genie
### Linux - Created a Linux build, but it doesn't want to talk with pcsx2 just yet. Still trying to understand this one.
Will not work with existing worlds

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.2.5
entry.content:
**Apworld:** - Fire and Void bow checks are disabled by default. They will be default enabled after restoration is working well for them. - Starting points bonus default increased from 2500 to 3000 - Map Specific items turned off by default again until there is better UI for them
**Mod:** - Basic Gobblegums are now unlocked to use in gum loadouts - Der Eisendrache Bows: - There is now a basic warning on-screen when bows are being restored - Storm and Wolf bows restore up to the arrow being placed on the pedestals. Until it can be worked around enjoy the free max ammo - Void bow restores up to needing to be fed 6 crawlers - Fix Storm and Wolf bow restoration not happening if you are wielding a Fire or Void bow - Fix rocket scene not running when restoring during the channelling stone step - Fix MPD not spawning when beating the keeper boss if restoring a save after the channelling stone step - Prevent player data saving when in beast mode - Fix crash when going down related to stamin-up and widow's wine
Wanted workshop map is still broken for now.

entry.title: Schedule I v3.5.3
entry.content: Updated logic for weed and cocaine recipes not requiring Warehouse access.

entry.title: Manual_Meteos_Konoko v1.1
entry.content: Goal is now get 2 planets, one of them being Meteo instead of needing all planets

entry.title: Monster Hunter World v0.1.3a0
entry.content:
Note: This patch will work with older games. You can run the generator or just replace the .dll in NativePC to fix the master rank goal completion. However, any changes to logic will not be applied unless games are regenerated with new apworld.
**FIXES** - Fixed an unlikely bug that would cause the game to crash every time the player loaded into a quest. - No longer will players receive a useless extra weapon and armor upgrade. - Simple fix were players would not receive items if they started a fresh save and had items waiting to be sent. Still a very specific edge case can cause this to happen but will be fixed in the next major release. - Removed the redundant Flying Sparks quest from the location pool. - Rathalos Rematch, The Fires of Hell Bite Deep, A Light Upon the River’s Gloom, and Today's Special: Hunter Flambé added to quest locations. No longer will they feel left out. - The Wings of Wrath Bite Deep location now has the correct required quest. - Gold and Astral tickets having the wrong ID thus not being given correctly. - Fixed typo in Antidote.

entry.title: Widget Inc v0.2.0
entry.content: - [Client] Hinted items in the tech tree glow a different color if hinted - Cyan: Hinted & In Logic - Purple: Hinted & Not In Logic - [Client] Location name in tech tree's font size increased 8 -> 12

entry.title: Mega Man Zero 3 v0.2.1
entry.content:
EX Skills and Suit Chips have been implemented!
# Changes
- Body and Leg chips have been implemented. - EX Skills have been implemented. - These are awarded based on your score on the level you just completed, rather than on your average score going into that level (Yes that's how they worked in the vanilla game). - Cyber Elves that boost your ranking for one level will also work in awarding the EX Skill location checks. Just use them before killing the boss. - The option that forces your rank to be "S" has been replaced with an option that will always reward you with an EX Skill regardless of your rank. This option is recommended, as currently, EX Skills are missable. In a later update you will be able to revisit levels and re-attempt an A rank.
# Known Bugs - EX Skills are currently missable. If you do not receive an A or higher on a level with an EX Skill check, there is no way to revisit it without loading an earlier save or savestate. This will be fixed in a later update. Consider using the "Always reward EX-Skill" option.

entry.title: Sonic Adventure DX v1.2.1rc0.post0
entry.content:
## [v1.2.1 pre-release 1] - 2026-03-24
### Added:
- You can now start with the Egg Carrier transformed (new default) or untransformed. - Added mod settings to disable the Ring Link sounds. - The map button can be reassigned or disabled in the mod settings. - You can also disable the in-game tracker while viewing the map (hidden by default). - Setting to ignore traps and filler items when connecting, enabled by default. - In key-item gating mode, closed doors will show a lock icon instead of the "no entry" symbol. - Updated setup guide to include Linux/Steam Deck information. - When entering a level with random level entrances, the alternative entrances to that level will be revealed on the map. - This applies to Speed Highway, Lost World, Final Egg and Sky Deck. - When playing with Random Level Entrances, a question mark icon will be shown in-game as well. - The icon will change to the level's initials after visiting the entrance for the first time.
### Changed:
- Map now shows the transformed state of the Egg Carrier. - Improved logic for the Egg Carrier transformation. - Redrawn map to be clearer and more consistent. - Improved contrast between icons and the map background. - Changed Chao Garden icons to be more distinguishable from level entrances. - Several logic updates to Expert DC and Expert DX.
### Fixed:
- Fixed typo in mission blacklist option. - Fixed typo in capsule sanity description. - Removed Big's upgrade from the Arsenal. - Lines and dots for the map now scale properly with the resolution. - Removed Angel Island to MRMain logic skips. - Fish tracker will no longer be shown for Amy and Gamma. - Fixed mission 51 card not being in the correct position. - Fixed "new" icon not showing up in the map. - Alternative entrances to stages are disabled when Random Level Entrances is off. - Fixed disabled capsules still being tracked by the arrow. - Fixed missing Life Belt upgrade for Big in the Ice Cave. - Fixed double ladder for Amy in Ice Cave. - Fixed Sky Chase 2 entrance transforming the Egg Carrier when exiting it.

entry.title: Stardew Valley v7.4.4
entry.content: - Introduced hotkey (config file, defaults to N) to open mail remotely [@itepastra] - Improved the community - Added a reroll button on Help Wanted quests, similar to the one on Special Orders - Reorganized the character creation menu to make the connection text fields bigger, and hopefully, less prone to FaQs

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.7.2
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.7.2 This update is compatible with worlds generated on version 0.7.0 and above!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md).
# Additions - New UI that shows how many Archipelago Items are left to collect. # Changes - Ceiling Rye and Skullcrushers now drop Archipelago Items when broken. - Archipelago Items now show the owning player's name and game in their name. - Increased the size of the Layer Selector. - The Skillsanity Tracker is now hidden while Unchipped mode is active. (will probably make this a YAML option later) # Fixes - Earning extra skill experience at Skillsanity level 14 should no longer cause an IndexOutOfRange error. - The game now pauses while selecting the next layer, instead of silently running in the background.
# Known Issues - Getting two traps in quick succession can cause the incorrect slot name inside the trap Moodle - Universal Tracker shows the wrong Moodles being in logic when Moodlesanity is set to Questboard - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators. - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.7.1...v0.7.2

entry.title: CrossCode v0.8.2rc1
entry.content:
## Changes to Generation
* Replaced the check **Vagabond Dojo Key** with **Trials of the Golden Bugs** (@CodeTriangle). * This change turns the check that gives the Dojo Key in vanilla into a quest reward so that the item hidden behind it can be previewed. * This new location has the same ID as the previous one, so this change only affects where in the cutscene the item is acquired.
## Changes to Mod
* Applied a series of changes to the Archipelago menus to make creating and playing games more intuitive (@CodeTriangle): - Allow any NG+ options to be selected regardless of previous save file completion. - No longer load into a game without NG+ enabled when exiting the text client menu using cancel button. - Add a clearer indication that NG+ options can be edited from the New Game Plus menu found in the Archipelago menu. - Block out "carry over" section of NG+ when editing options to indicate that they cannot be modified after save file creation. - Stop the game from blocking infinitely when entering new login information after previously entering login information and disconnecting.
## Migration Guide
This version of the mod and apworld **should be safe** to upgrade to from 0.8.1, 0.8.0, or 0.7.x. There is **some slight risk** involved in both of the changes made. You should not be in any serious danger. * There is a slight chance that some interactions break due to the generation change (but this can be fixed easily). * There is a small chance that a user interface may becomes unresponsive in a strange situation.
